description: Relational database schema for the LegacyFinApp-026 Hello World greeting application. Externalises GreetingRepository hard-coded values into persistent tables and adds full lifecycle audit via greeting_events.
ddl_file_path_note: Requested path was output/database_schema.sql; saved to workspace root because output/ directory did not exist.

tables.description: Configurable message format strings. Backs GreetingRepository.getGreetingTemplate().
Named greeting targets with default-value semantics. Backs GreetingRepository.getDefaultRecipient().
Immutable audit log of every greeting produced by GreetingService.createGreeting(). INSERT-only.
Key/value store for application settings currently hard-coded in Java source.

views.description: Active templates available for GreetingService. Filters is_active = TRUE.
Current default recipient (BR-013: 'World'). Used on null/blank input.
Denormalised event log joined to templates and recipients for dashboards.
Aggregated event counts and percentages by resolution strategy and workflow.

relationships.rationale: Many greetings use one template; prevent orphaned templates with event history
Recipient may be ad-hoc CLI value not in catalogue; preserve history if catalogue entry is removed

application_layer_only_rules.reason: NullPointerException on null GreetingService is a Java construction guard (Objects.requireNonNull); not representable as a SQL constraint.
NullPointerException on null GreetingRepository is a Java construction guard (Objects.requireNonNull); not representable as a SQL constraint.

design_decisions: greeting_events is INSERT-only (immutable audit log) — no updated_at column
Single default recipient enforced via partial unique index on (is_default) WHERE is_default = TRUE — avoids trigger complexity
recipient_id is nullable in greeting_events — supports ad-hoc CLI recipients not in catalogue
ON DELETE RESTRICT for template FK — prevents silent deletion of templates with history
ON DELETE SET NULL for recipient FK — preserves event history if catalogue entry is removed
placeholder_count stored as column alongside template_value — enables simple CHECK (placeholder_count = 1) without regex constraint
